data.name: Type1_Weekly.Expression
data.value: IIF([Type1] = 1, ?Age, IIF([Type1] = 2, ?FemaleBodyWt, IIF([Type1] = 3, ?FemaleFeed, IIF([Type1] = 4, ?FemaleMort, IIF([Type1] = 5, ?MaleBodyWt, IIF([Type1] = 6, ?MaleFeed, IIF([Type1] = 7, ?MaleMort, IIF([Type1] = 8, ?Env, NULL))))))))

data.name: Type2_Weekly.Expression
data.value: IIF([Type2] = 1, ?Days, IIF([Type2] = 2, ?Target, IIF([Type2] = 3, ?Actual, IIF([Type2] = 4, ?WeeklyGain, IIF([Type2] = 5, ?Uniformity, IIF([Type2] = 6, ?Target, IIF([Type2] = 7, ?Actual, IIF([Type2] = 8, ?FeedEnergy, IIF([Type2] = 9, ?FeedType, IIF([Type2] = 10, ?Birds, IIF([Type2] = 11, ?WeeklyPerc, IIF([Type2] = 12, ?CumPerc, IIF([Type2] = 13, ?Light, IIF([Type2] = 14, ?WaterConsumption, IIF([Type2] = 15, ?Temperature, NULL)))))))))))))))

data.name: $this.ScriptsSource
